message:
perf(vdbe): add GROUP BY rowid-bucket SUM codegen fast path; inline btree leaf cell encode

Codegen (crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/codegen.rs):
- Add GroupByRowidBucketSumPlan for queries of the form
  SELECT rowid/N, SUM(col) FROM t GROUP BY rowid/N
  which is a common access pattern for time-bucketed aggregation
- rowid_bucket_divisor() extracts the integer divisor from a
  rowid/literal expression after verifying the left operand resolves
  to the table's rowid via SortKeySource::Rowid
- simple_group_by_rowid_bucket_sum_plan() validates the 2-column
  result set (one group expr, one SUM(col)) against a single GROUP BY
  expression, returning None for any schema that doesn't match exactly
- codegen_select_group_by_rowid_bucket_sum() emits a linear-scan
  program that accumulates SUM per bucket using integer division on
  the rowid, yielding each (bucket_key, sum) row when the key changes
  and a final flush after the last row

Btree (crates/fsqlite-btree/src/cursor.rs):
- Add #[inline] to encode_table_leaf_cell_into() — this is the
  innermost serialization call in the INSERT hot path and benefits
  from monomorphization at each call site

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
